layout.spacing_system: Tight spacing for density. p-4 to p-6 for containers. gap-4 to gap-6 for grids.
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Use h-full on children.
layout.container_styles: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border (#27272A), no shadow by default. Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none).

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), high contrast. Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover. Include data-testid.
components.cards: Cardless or flat rectangular. 1px border. Deep background. Metric values in IBM Plex Mono.
components.tables: Dense rows, monospace font for IPs and bitrates, left-aligned data, sticky headers.
components.charts: Recharts with dark theme. Grid lines #27272A. Tooltips #141414 bg with 1px border.
components.logs: Terminal-style viewer. bg-[#0A0A0A], font-mono text-xs, color-coded log levels.
components.navigation: Left sidebar or dense top-nav. Use Phosphor Icons for a technical look.

motion.transitions: Fast and precise. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion.hover_states: Slight border highlight or background lighten. No bouncy animations.

icons.style: Regular or Duotone weight. Clean, technical.

images.description: Modern server room with blue network lights for the login page background.
Abstract data network for empty states or placeholder charts.
Engineer portrait for the user profile.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='stream-row-delete').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a dense, NOC-style dark dashboard. Use standard HTML/Tailwind structures heavily utilizing grid for the control-room layout. Do not use excessive card padding. Data must be front and center. Install @phosphor-icons/react and recharts. Use IBM Plex Mono for all numeric metrics, IPs, and bandwidth data.
